claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch already implements complete support for research/fetch style external evidence with proper scope=external marking and project-fact boundary enforcement.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES defines four scope values: project, external, user, unknown
evidence.why: Core data model supports external scope declaration

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors validates that all evidence records declare scope as project, external, user, or unknown
evidence.why: Schema enforcement ensures scope is always declared

evidence.summary: demandRequestsExternalResearch detects explicit external research requests via URLs or fetch/search keywords
evidence.why: System can detect when external evidence is required

evidence.summary: externalEvidencePresent checks if agent results include scope=external evidence with URL or external source
evidence.why: Validation verifies external evidence was actually gathered

evidence.summary: Agent prompt instructs: 'If the demand explicitly asks for external research/fetch/search, actually use an available web/fetch/search-capable tool. Record those records as scope=external'
evidence.why: Agent protocol explicitly requires external tool usage and scope marking

evidence.summary: Post-execution validation adds EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker when external research was requested but no scope=external evidence found
evidence.why: Runtime enforcement prevents missing external evidence

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION requires path for project scope, url for external scope, and mandatory scope field
evidence.why: Schema enforces proper evidence structure per scope type

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues adds PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker when evidence is only external/user/unknown for existing-project facts
evidence.why: Prevents external evidence from being used as project facts

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: 'Project facts require project-scoped evidence from code, tests, docs, config, logs, or artifacts, with a repo-relative path or file locator'
evidence.why: Product requirements explicitly separate project vs external evidence

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot creates pre-execution snapshot of all project files outside allowed artifact roots
evidence.why: Boundary enforcement detects any unauthorized project mutations

evidence.summary: diffBoundarySnapshots compares before/after snapshots to detect any added, modified, or deleted project files
Post-execution boundary diff generates BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers for any project files changed outside allowed artifact root
evidence.why: Runtime enforcement prevents target project mutations

evidence.summary: executionConfig normalizes agent_tool_profile to 'research' for research/fetch/web tool profiles
evidence.why: Tool access control supports external research mode

evidence.summary: Agent prompt allows web/fetch/search tools with scope=external marking when agentToolProfile includes 'research'
evidence.why: Tool access control supports external research mode

assumptions: The explorer used mcp__web_reader__webReader to fetch https://example.com during evidence gathering, but this is not present in the code artifacts I reviewed
risks: If claim is wrong, agents might use external evidence as project facts or mutate project files during evidence gathering

result.notes: Independent verification confirms the explorer's claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch fully implements external evidence support with (1) four-scope data model including 'external', (2) agent protocol requiring scope=external marking for fetched/web evidence, (3) schema validation enforcing scope declarations, (4) PRD readiness validation preventing external evidence from satisfying project-fact requirements, (5) boundary audit preventing target project mutations. All evidence verified from actual source files with corrected line numbers. The system correctly separates project-scoped facts from external research evidence.
